I need the ClearGrip case for my Pixel 7, but do not add it until you verify why the Pixel 8 one is not the right fit.

Here’s why the Pixel 8 ClearGrip case is not the right fit for your Pixel 7:

- The **Pixel 8 case (SP-H108)** is explicitly listed as compatible with: **“Google Pixel 8”** only.  
- The **Pixel 7 case (SP-H107)** is explicitly listed as compatible with: **“Google Pixel 7”** only.  

Phone cases are molded to the exact dimensions and port/camera cutouts of a specific model. The Pixel 7 and Pixel 8 have different body dimensions and camera module layouts, so:

- The **camera cutout** on the Pixel 8 case will not align correctly with the Pixel 7 camera bar.
- The **button and port cutouts** (power, volume, microphones) are positioned for the Pixel 8’s hardware layout, not the Pixel 7’s.
- Even if you could force it on, it may be loose/tight in the wrong places and not protect the phone properly.

So, the Pixel 8 ClearGrip case is not suitable for a Pixel 7; you should use the **ClearGrip Case for Pixel 7 (SP-H107)** instead.

If you’d like, I can add the **ClearGrip Case for Pixel 7** to your cart now.
